name: hearth-dash
description: Personal dashboard — moods, moments, food diary, weather, and more. Deploy to Cloudflare in one command.

scripts.db:init: npx wrangler d1 execute hearth-dash-db --file schema.sql
scripts.db:init:remote: npx wrangler d1 execute hearth-dash-db --remote --file schema.sql

author: AIDHD
